details.message: reports/board/ directory is missing. Expected top-level subdirectory under reports/.
reports/board/ directory is missing; governance contract requires reports/audit/ and reports/board/ both present.

moltbot/ directory exists with active code (sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, board.py). Scripts reference moltbot/clawdbot patterns: scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py. These are code/config references outside the excluded reports/audit and docs-documenting-removal paths.
